---
title: "Titanic Data Analysis Report"
author: "Stephen Mariga"
date: "2026-04-06"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

# Introduction

This report analyzes the Titanic dataset to understand factors affecting survival.

# Data Cleaning

- Handled missing values in `Age` (177 missing replaced with median)
- Removed unnecessary variables like `Cabin`
- Checked for duplicates and corrected data types

# Data Visualization

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
# Example: Survival count
ggplot(data, aes(x = Survived)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue")
```
> Every code chunk is enclosed in ```{r} ... ``` so R runs it and includes results in the report.  

data <- read.csv("titanic_cleaned.csv")
